name: Miss Piggy's White Gravy
recipeInstructions:
1. Chicken fried pour-off with goodies left in is best.
2. Heat grease until very hot, stirring constantly, and add enough flour to form a heavy mixture.
3. Add garlic salt and pepper to taste (sparingly).
4. Brown the sauce, then lower heat and gradually stir in evaporated milk and water until smooth.
5. Cook to desired thickness.
